text:
Market today: Yields are creeping up, and there's some worry about AI hype. This is a tough combo for your tech-heavy, leveraged book.

Your holdings: SOXL is looking rough at -28.7%, and QQQI is also in the red, down -1.86%. These need attention.

Watch: SMH has a BUY signal from the scanner, but it's also in your holdings and currently down. Keep an eye on that one.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and the ones showing losses.
plays: Trim QQQI if it dips further towards its 52 stop.
Consider trimming SOXL if it shows no immediate bounce.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
